# ResuVibe

> AI-powered resume, cover letter, and interview prep tools that turn your experience into tailored job application materials.

ResuVibe helps job seekers build ATS-optimized resumes, craft role-specific cover letters, and practice behavioral interview answers grounded in their own work history.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page for ResuVibe.
- [About](/about): What ResuVibe does and who it's for.
- [Pricing](/premium): ResuVibe Premium plans and features.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the ResuVibe team.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Privacy Request](/privacy-request): Submit a privacy data request.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.

## FAQ

- [FAQ Directory](/FAQ): Browse all role-specific career FAQs.
- [Software Engineer FAQ](/FAQ/software-engineer): Resume and interview guidance for software engineers.
- [Data Analyst FAQ](/FAQ/data-analyst): Resume and interview guidance for data analysts.
- [Product Manager FAQ](/FAQ/product-manager): Resume and interview guidance for product managers.
- [Project Manager FAQ](/FAQ/project-manager): Resume and interview guidance for project managers.
- [Marketing Manager FAQ](/FAQ/marketing-manager): Resume and interview guidance for marketing managers.
- [Nurse Practitioner FAQ](/FAQ/nurse-practitioner): Resume and interview guidance for nurse practitioners.

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap for search engines.
